summary: A recap of the White House ceremony for the Indiana University Hoosiers as 2025 College Football National Champions. Frames show Trump walking outside the White House, the podium ceremony with a team jersey, and B-roll of the Indiana helmet, championship trophy and a 'TRUMP 47' jersey, over a Trump speech welcoming the team. It is an event and speech recap. No music track.
notable_text: Tweet: 'CHAMPION ENERGY.'; B-roll of 'TRUMP 47' Indiana jersey and CFP National Championship trophy
